titleStmt.title: SII 36.93: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 93. (A.R. No. 93 of 1910.) TIRUMĀḶAM (Kōviltirumāḷam), NANNILAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Māgāḷēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and unfinished. Records a royal order of the king regarding some lands belonging to the dēvadāna of the temple of Ambar Tirumāgāḷam Uḍaiyār in Ambar-nāḍu, a subdivision of Uyyakkoṇḍārvaḷanāḍu. The oral order was pronounced by the king on a request prefered by Nuḷambarājaṉ, while present in his throne, Vāṇādhirājaṉ, in the hall called, Rājēndrachōḻaṉ, situated on the western part of the palace at Muḍigoṇḍa Chōḻa[puram]. Since dues could not be realized from the kāṉi holder owing to some difficulties, it was requested that the land of the defaulter shall be transferred to another person for proper realization of taxes. Hence in the forty second year of the king the lands in dispute were re-assigned as kāni to Āyakkuḍaiyāṉ alias Tāṇḍaṉ and his descendants.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟanta maṇimuṭi cūṭi mīṉavar nilaikeṭa villavarkolai tara
Ēṉai maṉṉavaririyaluṟṟuḻitarat tikkaṉaittuñ taṉ cakkaranaṭātti vīraciṅkācaṉattu Avaṉimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko
virājakecariparmarkaḷ cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu muṭikoṇṭacoḻapurattuk koyiliṉuḷḷā
l Āṭṭattuveḷi melaimaṇṭapam rājentracoḻaṉil vāṇātirājaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu ceyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉa paṭi Uyyakkoṇ
ṭār vaḷaṉāṭṭu Amparṉāṭṭu Ampart tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉam Innāṭṭu Iruṅkuṭiyāṉa cempiyaṉ vācaṟkuṭi kāṇiāḷan ṉilaiṉiṉṟu payireṟṟi I
ṟai Iṟuttuvārāmaiyāl pāḻāy Antarāyak kācuñ cellāteṉṟu kāṇiuṭaiya kāṇiāḷarait tavira Iyāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu mutal Āyakku
ṭaiyaṉāṉa tāṇṭaṉ Ivaṉ vaṟkattārukkuk kāṇi kuṭu veṉṟu nuḷamparājaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamayyil Ivvūr Aḷanteṟiṉa ṉila
uḷpaṭa kkuṭuttom Ippaṭi m variyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum Ikkāṇiāḷaṉukkup peṟumpaṭi kūṟai
yum pokakkāṭṭi kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭik kuṭukkaveṉṟu tiruvāy moḻin taruḷat tirumantira Ōlai mīṉavaṉ brahmaśrīmārāyaṉ Eḻuttiṉāl pukunta ceyyum paṭip
paṭiyum meṟpaṭiyāṉ Eḻuttiṉāl I nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ Irupatināl vanta tirumukappaṭiyum puravuvarināyakam nāṅkoṟṟaṉuṅ kū
ttaṉūraṭṭaiyāṉuṅ karuppūruṭaiyāṉum ruṭaiyāṉum mukaveṭṭi pūcaṅkuṭaiyāṉum marutaṅ kiḻāṉum veḷūr kiḻavaṉum Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻut
tiṭṭu vanta Uḷvarippaṭi yāṇṭu nāṟpattiraṇṭāvatu Āyakkuṭaiyāṉāṉa tāṇṭaṉ Ātittaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattārkkum kāṇiyāka Uyyakko
ṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu Ampar nāṭṭu Ampar tirumākāḷamuṭaiyār tevatāṉam Iruṅkuṭiyāṉa cempiyanvācakuṭi tiruulakaḷanteṟiṉa nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam nāṟ
pattāṟe kāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉāl nellu nālāyirattu Ainūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟuk kalattiṉāl pattāṟākki nel Iraṇṭāyirattu Eḻunū
ṟṟaim pattaṟu kalane Aiṅkuṟuṇiyiṉā laḷakkum nel Iraṇṭāyirattu Eḻunūṟṟaimpataṟu kalaṉe Aiṅkuṟuṇi nel Ittevar tevatāṉamāṉa Ūrkaḷil tiruula
kaḷan teṟi �kku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa nilattukkut talaimāṟu tiṟappāṉaṉilam Oṉṟaraiye mūṉṟu mākkāṇi Araikkaāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl kāṇik
kaṭaṉ nellu nūṟṟu pattaiṅkalane tūṇip patakkiṉāl pattāṟākki nel nūṟṟuk kalattiṉāl niccayitta nel nūṟṟukkalam nīkki tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili ni
lam nāṟpattu nāle Āṟumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉāl kāṇikkaṭaṉ nellu nālāyirattu nāṉūṟṟu Irupattu Eṇ kalane Aiṅkuṟuṇiṉāl pattāṟākki
nel Iraṇṭāyirattu Aṟunūṟṟu Aimpattu Āṟiṉāl nel Aiṅkuṟuṇiṉāl ṉiccayitta nel Iraṇṭāyirattu Aṟuṉūṟṟu Aimpattu Aṟu kalane Aiṅ- (continuation lost)
Digital edition of SII 36.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
